## Review focus

## Checklist

- [ ] Issue number included
- [ ] Tested the happy path locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for new logic, or no new logic was added
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes, or no UI was changed
- [ ] No migration added, or migration is backward-compatible with no data loss
